creator: abe@purdue.edu
text:
Stefan,

You write:
>
> just a quick note regarding this PR: FreeBSD 5.3 is quite old 
> already - I
> would suggest updating to 5.5 or 6.2 if possible before 
> trying anything
> else. (The port builds fine on 6.2 here.)

That's good advice.  Once I no longer have access to a FreeBSD
version -- and I have none to 5.3 -- I can't validate it there.
I try to avoid making changes that will affect FreeBSD versions
to which I no longer have access, but that isn't always successful.

Vic, lsof author
